summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Daily SEO Articles Automation feature. All backend APIs working (15/15 tests pass). Frontend UI fully functional with all automation settings working correctly.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating new settings
fixed.fix: Added settings.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() to remove MongoDB _id

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1
design_issues.note: Charts render correctly despite console warnings - cosmetic issue only

passed_tests: GET /api/automation/sites - returns all sites with automation settings
GET /api/automation/sites - requires authentication (403 without token)
GET /api/automation/site/{site_id} - returns settings for specific site
GET /api/automation/site/{invalid_id} - returns 404 for invalid site
POST /api/automation/site/{site_id} - updates settings to manual mode
POST /api/automation/site/{site_id} - updates settings to automatic mode with next_generation
POST /api/automation/site/{site_id} - accepts all frequency values (daily, every_2_days, every_3_days, weekly)
POST /api/automation/site/{site_id} - accepts all article length values (short, medium, long)
POST /api/automation/site/{invalid_id} - returns 404 for invalid site
GET /api/automation/history - returns list of auto-generated articles
GET /api/automation/history - requires authentication
POST /api/automation/generate-now - requires authentication
POST /api/automation/generate-now - accepts site_id parameter
GET /api/automation/config - returns user automation config
POST /api/automation/config - updates user automation config
Frontend - Automatizare link in sidebar navigation
Frontend - AutomationPage loads with correct title
Frontend - Sites table displays with all columns
Frontend - Settings dialog opens with mode selection
Frontend - Automatic mode shows frequency, hour, enable toggle
Frontend - Article length dropdown works
Frontend - Product links toggle works
Frontend - Settings save successfully
Frontend - Table updates after settings change
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization in 3 endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test user and WordPress site created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily SEO Articles Automation feature fully tested. All endpoints working: GET/POST /api/automation/sites, GET/POST /api/automation/site/{id}, POST /api/automation/generate-now, GET /api/automation/history. Frontend AutomationPage.jsx working with settings dialog for mode, frequency, hour, article length, and product links. MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug was fixed in server.py.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/automation/sites: Returns all sites with automation settings
backend_endpoints.POST /api/automation/site/{site_id}: Updates automation settings (mode, enabled, hour, frequency, length, product_links)

frontend_features.sites_table: Displays all sites with settings columns
frontend_features.frequency_options: Daily, every 2 days, every 3 days, weekly
